description: Printful is a print-on-demand and dropshipping platform that lets merchants and creators sell custom products without holding inventory. It handles product printing, fulfillment, and shipping, and also offers enterprise design-maker capabilities.
summary: Printful exposes REST HTTP APIs for its main API v1, API v2 beta, and Embedded Design Maker-related endpoints; authentication is via private bearer tokens, with public-app OAuth also documented for the main API. No GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found.
